chunks.text: Contact Berkeley EECS - EECS at Berkeley Contact Berkeley EECS 253 Cory Hall, Berkeley, CA 94720-1770. +1 (510) 642-3214 Directory Questions About Becoming a Student Undergraduate programs Graduate programs : gradadmissions@eecs.berkeley.edu Master of Engineering ( MEng ): mengadmissions@eecs.berkeley.edu Graduate admissions FAQ Questions About the Department CS class enrollment: cs-enrollments @cs.berkeley.edu Preparation for majoring in CS or EECS prospective-ugradstudents @eecs.berkeley.edu Public relations and job/event announcements: public-relations @eecs.berkeley.edu Industry recruitment: cap-admin @eecs.berkeley.edu Alumni relations: alumni-relations @eecs.berkeley.edu Website and general: webteam @eecs.berkeley.edu Questions by Department Members Computer support: help @eecs.berkeley.edu Check System Status EECS undergraduate program : eecs-advising @eecs.berkeley.edu CS undergraduate program : cs-advising @cs.berkeley.edu Staff contact quick list Department email lists (login required) Cory and Soda room reservations EECS Main Office 253 Cory Hall Berkeley, CA 94720-1770 Phone: +1 (510) 642-3214 Fall/Spring semester : Monday to Friday 9 am – 4 pm (closed 12 pm-1 pm) Pacific Time. Spring, Summer, and Winter breaks, including RRR and finals week: Monday to Thursday 9 am – 3:30 pm (closed 12 pm – 1 pm), Friday 9 am – 2:00 pm (closed 12 pm – 1 pm) Pacific Time. Posting Job, Conference and Other Outside Announcements to the EECS Department We do not publicize external job openings or outside conferences, or make any other external EECS-related announcements to members of our department on our website or via email.
